name: Selfhost Web App Template
description: React + Vite client with Hono + Better Auth server scaffold for self-hosted deployments.
notes: Default FC shape is event adapter for JSON/CRUD apps.
Switch to fc-entry.web.ts and custom runtime for streaming/SSE/WebSocket/large-response apps.
Auth uses Better Auth REST with bearer token transport. Better Auth storage is backed by skybase-db through apps/server/_core/db.ts.

apps/server/_core/db.ts is the only runtime DB gateway and owns libsql/Drizzle clients. It reads SKYBASE_DB_ENDPOINT, SKYBASE_DB_AUTH_TOKEN or legacy SKYBASE_DB_TOKEN, and SKYBASE_DB_NAMESPACE from server env and injects x-namespace for sqld.

Drizzle schema lives in apps/server/db/schema.ts. The template runtime does not create databases or run migrations; controller/agent tooling owns provisioning and setup_database applies schema before runtime. Do not expose DB setup or migration scripts from the generated app.
